REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1496 La Playa Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Jaynes for Joseph De La Rosa, Jr. (Petitioner/Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $1,250,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 4, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,200,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate set for January 14, 2020 is continued to February 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at Ms. Jaynes request to allow closing of escrow and for filing of a final petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.
